data.body:
S2 CLOSED with a passing completion-verifier attestation. Two transparency notes:
1. LIVE SMOKE CONFIRMED (belated — my earlier comment said 'in progress'): drove the local voter against real 2-parent merge change 183 on the running Gerrit 3.14.1 -> merge_detection (parent_count=2), merge_change_review (1 integrated commit) -> cast vote message '[LLM-Review: PASS (merge-change, 1 integrated commit(s))]' (verified on the change). Also captured the live files/ no-parent fixture. So AC7's live smoke IS met.
2. CONCURRENCY ACCIDENT: I inadvertently launched two close attempts; the completion verifier (a non-deterministic LLM) PASSED on one run (signing + closing) and FAILED on the other, flagging that the journald event 'merge_change_409_guard' named in the plan's What section is absent. This is valid: I implemented the 409 guard STRUCTURALLY (is_merge branches before get_patch; unit test asserts get_patch_calls==0 on merges) but emit no event by that name. FOLLOW-UP: add a defensive merge_change_409_guard ERROR event on the get_patch path (if get_patch ever 409s, that signals a merge that detection missed — a genuinely useful signal), landed as a small follow-up change. Filing that now.
